linear.name: linear
linear.description: Linear project management — read/write issues, projects, milestones, labels, and statuses for the My App team (workspace: myprojectspace)

google-drive.name: google-drive
google-drive.description: Google Drive, Sheets, and Docs — read/write files, spreadsheets, and documents.
use_cases: Read design specs or PRDs from Google Docs
Pull data from Google Sheets (e.g. content, config, test cases)
Search Drive for existing documents before creating new ones

github.name: github
github.description: GitHub — read/write repos, issues, PRs, branches, and code. Requires Claude Desktop or Claude Code.

setup.requires: Claude Desktop or Claude Code (not claude.ai web)
install_steps: 1. Get a GitHub PAT at https://github.com/settings/tokens/new (scopes: repo, read:org, read:user)
2. Add the block below to your Claude Desktop config

use_cases: Create branches matching Linear issue IDs (feat/MY-XX-...)
Open PRs and link back to Linear issues
Search codebase for context before making changes

_readme.purpose: MCP server config for Claude Code / Claude Desktop / AI-powered tooling

server_status.github: ⚠️  Requires Claude Desktop or Claude Code (local stdio)
